description:
A Thank Your For Your Application template for a recruitment/hiring company. Find the right talent for your business and increase job applicants, this page lets the applicant know that the application has been received, contains a link to other job openings and reminds the applicant of some of the benefits of working at the company. Part of the Recruitment Collection. 

All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
